text: Bald Eagles
Bald eagle on snowy shore, watching the sea.
original_text: A bald eagle is perched on a snowy shoreline, gazing towards the sea.

text: Bald eagle, snowy mountains.
original_text: Close-up: A bald eagle perched against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains.

text: Bald eagle on a bare branch.
original_text: A bald eagle is perched on a bare tree branch against a clear blue sky.

text: Bald eagle, ocean background.
original_text: Close-up: A bald eagle's head and shoulders, with the sea in the background.

text: Fledgling
Young bald eagle on a grassy bank overlooking water.
original_text: A young, all-brown bald eagle, a fledgling, sits near the edge of a grassy bank overlooking a body of water.

text: Bald eagle soars over snow-capped mountains and water.
original_text: An adult Bald Eagle soars through the air against a backdrop of snow-capped mountains and a large lake or sea.

text: E PLURIBUS UNUM
ANNUIT COEPTIS
A bald eagle soars, the Great Seal to its left.
original_text: The Great Seal of the USA is shown on the left side of the screen. An adult Bald Eagle soars in flight on the right side of the screen against a cloudy sky.

text: Eagle soars over water.
original_text: A Bald Eagle soars over a large body of water.

text: Bald eagle in autumn leaves.
original_text: The Bald Eagle perches in a tree with fall foliage.

text: Eagle soars, scanning the water.
original_text: A Bald Eagle soars through the sky, scanning the water below.

text: Eagle steals fish, drops it, catches another, flies off.
original_texts: The eagle snatches a fish from the water with its talons.
Another eagle appears and tries to steal the fish.
During the struggle, the first eagle drops the fish.
The eagle dives again and successfully catches another fish.
The eagle flies away with the fish.

text: A bald eagle swoops down, snatches a fish, and another eagle tries to steal it.
original_texts: A Bald Eagle swoops down towards the water.
The Bald Eagle snatches a fish from the water with its talons.
Another Bald Eagle attempts to steal the fish.

text: A bald eagle swoops low over the river, dipping its talons in the water before soaring again.
original_texts: A Bald Eagle soars low over a river.
The Bald Eagle dips its talons in the water briefly and resumes soaring.

text: Eagle low over water, fish in talons.
original_text: A Bald Eagle flies low over the water, carrying a fish in its talons.

text: Eagle approaches, trying to steal the fish.
original_text: Another Bald Eagle approaches, attempting to steal the fish.

text: Eagle drops fish.
original_text: The first eagle drops the fish into the water.

text: The second eagle dives for the dropped fish, but misses.
original_texts: The second eagle dives towards the water where the first eagle dropped the fish and misses.

text: A bald eagle swoops low, clutching a fish in its talons.
original_texts: A Bald Eagle flies low over the water, carrying a fish in its talons.

text: Eagle snatches fish and soars away over the water.
original_texts: The eagle successfully carries the fish away, flying over the water's surface.

text: High in a tree, a bald eagle eats a fish.
original_text: A Bald Eagle is perched high in a tree, eating a fish it has caught.

text: A bald eagle perches on a metal structure.
original_texts: A bald eagle is perched on a metal structure.

text: cranes
sea lions
Cranes fly alongside swimming sea lions.
original_text: Two videos appear side by side, one showing cranes in flight and the other showing sea lions swimming underwater.
